extractionPolicy.principle: No lossy summarization: each expert.profile and project.summary preserves the full extracted raw text block from the source PDF pages/record.
extractionPolicy.structuredFields: Structured fields are an index only; rawTextPreserved=true fields are the source of truth.

importPolicy.reviewNotes: Plan-B exact structured import prepared outside the app from uploaded PDFs. Each record preserves the full extracted raw text block and source page/record reference. Use source text as factual basis.

portfolioSummary.rawText:
PORTFOLIO SUMMARY
Total Projects Documented: 114
Completed Projects: 107
Ongoing Projects: 7
International Projects: 5 (Nigeria, South Sudan, Kenya)
Service Scope: Full-cycle consultancy from Feasibility Study & Geotechnical Investigation through
Architectural, Structural, MEP (Electrical, Sanitary, Mechanical, Electromechanical) Design, to Contract
Administration & Construction Supervision, and specialized Geological Investigation Services.
Project Types: General Hospitals, Specialty Hospitals, Factories (Food Processing, Textile, Plastic, Wood,
Metal), Commercial High-Rises, Mixed-Use Apartments, Hotels, Roads, Museums, Master Plans, International
Joint Ventures, Geotechnical Investigations, Gas Stations, Residential & Commercial Buildings.
Geographic Reach: Ethiopia (Amhara, Addis Ababa, South Ethiopia, Oromia Regions), Nigeria (Abuja), South
Sudan (Juba), Kenya (Moyale).
